name: context-first-mcp
description: Context Custodian MCP server — fight LLM context degradation with 37 tools across 7 layers: context health, state management, sandboxing, persistent memory, advanced reasoning (InftyThink, Coconut, KAG-Thinker, MindEvolution, ExtraCoT), truthfulness verification, and structured research pipeline with autonomous file writing. One context_loop call orchestrates all layers and returns a unified directive.
